headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Simon Property Group (SPG) After Recent Pullback In The Share Price
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Simon Property Group, at around US$188 a share, still offers value or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price. The stock has returned 3.6% over the past week and 2.2% year to date, with a 15.9% return over the last year and very large gains over the past 3 and 5 years. Recent attention has focused on Simon Property Group as a major US retail REIT, with investors reacting to ongoing headlines around consumer spending, physical retail traffic...
